ddls:
CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the organism */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the organism */,
  "taxonomy_id" TEXT /* Taxonomy identifier */,
  "assembly_id" TEXT /* Assembly identifier */,
  "genome_size" INTEGER /* Genome size in base pairs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chromosome */,
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the organism the chromosome belongs to */,
  "chromosome_name" TEXT /* Name of the chromosome (e.g., Ca1, Ca2) */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome in base pairs */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the chromosome (e.g., autosomal, sex) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene */,
  "loc_id" TEXT /* Gene location identifier (e.g., LOC101493068) */,
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Protein identifier (e.g., XP_004513719.1) */,
  "chromosome_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the chromosome the gene is located on */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "amino_acids" INTEGER /* Number of amino acids in the protein */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the protein */,
  "transcript_id" TEXT /* Transcript identifier (e.g., XM_004513662) */,
  "exon_count" INTEGER /* Number of exons in the gene */,
  "strand" TEXT /* Strand orientation of the gene (+ or -) */,
  "isoform_count" INTEGER /* Number of isoforms for the gene */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_chromosome_id FOREIGN KEY ("chromosome_id") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chromosome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "isoforms" (
  "isoform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each isoform */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene the isoform belongs to */,
  "isoform_number" INTEGER /* Number of the isoform */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the isoform */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the isoform in base pairs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("isoform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_isoforms_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exons" (
  "exon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exon */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene the exon belongs to */,
  "exon_number" INTEGER /* Number of the exon */,
  "start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the exon on the chromosome */,
  "end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the exon on the chromosome */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the exon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exons_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transcripts" (
  "transcript_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transcript */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene the transcript belongs to */,
  "transcript_name" TEXT /* Name of the transcript (e.g., XM_004513662) */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the transcript */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the transcript in base pairs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transcript_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transcripts_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the gene the protein is encoded by */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Name of the protein (e.g., XP_004513719.1) */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Sequence of the protein */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein in amino acids */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, data access) */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the activity occurred */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Details of the data accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., gene, protein, transcript) */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., gene, protein, transcript) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data being annotated */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who has the permission */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., gene, protein, transcript) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data being accessed */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sharing */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the data */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., gene, protein, transcript) */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data being shared */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the data is shared with */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
